name: read_doc
description: Read a Google Doc by its document_id. Returns the plain text plus a structured list of elements with their startIndex/endIndex (and any object/element IDs) so you can target precise docs_batch_update edits.

document_id.description: The Google Docs document ID (from create_doc or a docs.google.com URL).

operator.description: Optional. If omitted, resolves to the BlackBox's current operator (single operator auto-selected; otherwise the system default). Do not hard-code an operator name.

returns: JSON with document_id, title, text, an elements[] index map (startIndex/endIndex/type/text), and inline_object_ids (or an error string).
notes: The elements[] index map is the key to editing: each entry's startIndex/endIndex tells you exactly which range to target in a docs_batch_update request (e.g. updateTextStyle over a paragraph's range).
